description: Autonomous background tasks for AGN. All jobs must be non-destructive and respect emergency_stop.

jobs.name: health_check_quick
jobs.description: Quick system health check — CPU, disk, SSOT, daemons (no tests)

jobs.name: health_check_full
jobs.description: Full health check including test suite

jobs.name: awakening_refresh
jobs.description: Refresh awakening context (backup — daemon should handle this)
jobs.note: Only enable if awakening daemon launchd is not running

jobs.name: memory_index
jobs.description: Re-index memory records and audit trail into ChromaDB for semantic search

jobs.name: maintenance_locks
jobs.description: Remove stale lock files older than 1 hour

jobs.name: maintenance_logs
jobs.description: Compress JSONL audit/scheduler logs older than 7 days

jobs.name: maintenance_quarantine
jobs.description: Remove quarantined memory records older than 30 days
